news.t: State Street Investment Management Enhances Its Low-Cost State Street® SPDR® Portfolio ETF™ Suite

overview.description: The State Street SPDR Portfolio Short Term Treasury ETF (SPTS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US Treasurys with remaining maturities between 1-3 years. SPTS was launched on Nov 30, 2011 and is issued by State Street.
